title: Challenges and Opportunities for Agricultural R&D in the Semi-Arid Tropics
abstract:
To proactively address challenges and new developments in its rapidly changing task
environment, ICRISAT is mapping out a new Strategic Plan to 2020. This initiative is also
being undertaken to pursue the recommendation of ICRISAT’s sixth External Program and
Management Review (EPMR) in 2009-2010.
Essentially, strategic planning enables us to:
